mapper.insert: INSERT INTO requirement_review_meeting (title, project_name, project_no, department, amount, start_time, end_time, location, organizer_name, status, bid_id, bid_title, create_time, create_user_name) VALUES (#{title}, #{projectName}, #{projectNo}, #{department}, #{amount}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{location}, #{organizerName}, #{status}, #{bidId}, #{bidTitle}, NOW(), #{createUserName})
